events.title: Guest Lecture: Future of AI
events.description: An inspiring talk on how AI will shape the future of jobs and education.

events.title: Hackathon 2025
events.description: A 24-hour coding event for all departments. Solve problems, win prizes!

events.title: Cybersecurity Workshop
events.description: Learn ethical hacking and network security essentials.

events.title: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
events.description: Build and pitch your startup ideas in a 3-day bootcamp.

events.title: Women in Tech Panel
events.description: Join top women leaders in tech for a panel discussion and Q&A.

events.title: Photography Exhibition
events.description: Photography club showcases its best works — open for public viewing.

events.title: Annual Tech Fest
events.description: Exhibitions, coding contests, and tech games throughout the week.

events.title: Resume Building Workshop
events.description: Learn to create professional resumes for placements and internships.

events.title: Blood Donation Camp
events.description: Help save lives by donating blood. Organized with Red Cross Society.

events.title: Green Campus Drive
events.description: Join the NSS team in planting trees around campus.

feedback.message: The new dashboard layout is really helpful!
Can we get a dark mode option in the portal?
The announcements are very informative. Keep them coming!
Loved the recent AI guest lecture. Very engaging.
Portal is loading slower than usual in the evenings.
Can the events page show only upcoming events by default?
Appreciate the extra library hours during exams!
It would be great if we had notification alerts for new announcements.
Feedback section is useful. I hope someone actually reads these!
Is there a way to contact faculty directly from the portal?
